text: Reputational and regulatory risks surfaced during the period. On August 11, 2025, media coverage highlighted a personal account alleging the platform enabled an abusive ex-partner to steal identity and potentially put others at risk, raising questions about platform safety protocols C004. This follows broader scrutiny of short-term rental platforms regarding guest verification and host accountability. The combination of margin guidance concerns, strategic pivots into hotels, and ongoing safety-related headlines suggests management faces multiple execution challenges heading into the second half of 2025.
